ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bicycle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bicycle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the bicycle model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the bicycle model */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Product line of the bicycle model (e.g., Road, Mountain, Hybrid) */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Production status of the bicycle model (e.g., In Production, Discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "component_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type (e.g., Crank Length, Handlebar Width) */,
  "component_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the component type (e.g., mm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component specification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle model */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the bicycle (e.g., Small, Medium, Large, X-Large) */,
  "measurement" REAL /* Measurement value for the component */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance value for the component */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_specifications_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_specifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES bicycle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle model */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the bicycle (e.g., Small, Medium, Large, X-Large) */,
  "supplier_measurement" REAL /* Measurement value provided by the supplier */,
  "supplier_price" REAL /* Price of the component provided by the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id", "model_id", "component_type_id", "size")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle model */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the bicycle (e.g., Small, Medium, Large, X-Large) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of components ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES bicycle_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle model */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the bicycle (e.g., Small, Medium, Large, X-Large) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity in inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES bicycle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Engineer, Quality Control, Supply Chain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle model */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level for the user (e.g., Read, Write, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES bicycle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component specification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Update, Delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES component_specifications ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
